title: Lovely Pink Solid Round Plastic Table Cover (213cm) 1 Count – Vibrant & Durable Party Essential for Easy Cleanup and Decoration, 7.5 inch (Round)
features: VIBRANT LOVELY PINK COLOR: a splash of color to your party with our lovely pink solid round plastic table cover - a perfect addition to birthday parties, bridal showers, baby showers, gender reveal parties, and more.

PREMIUM QUALITY & DURABLE MATERIAL: Our 213cm round plastic table cover is made of high-quality materials, ensuring long-lasting durability for a worry-free party experience. It's tear-resistant so your event stays mess-free.

EASY CLEANUP & REUSABLE: This practical table cover not only adds a pop of color to your event, but also makes post-party cleanup a breeze. Simply wipe off any spills or messes and reuse for future events, if desired.

1 COUNT PACK: This pack contains 1 lovely pink solid round plastic table cover, just the right amount for decorating a single table at your event. Combine with matching or contrasting tableware and decorations for a complete and stylish look.

AFFORDABLE & VERSATILE DECORATION: Enhance your party setup at an affordable price, without sacrificing style. This versatile table cover can be used for indoor or outdoor events and is suitable for various occasions.
